ab: Kasemuwal may tu urip nu misu.
Ci Kumud ku ngangan nu maku, muktep ku mihecaan nu kaku anini.
en: My name is Noami Kumud, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: Cima ku ngangan nu misu?
Ci Kumud Luuh ku ngangan nu maku.
U maanan a vinacadan nu wawa kisu?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: U wawa nu Pangcah kaku.
U Yincumin amin haw ku lalavu nu luma’ nu misu?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Hayi, u Pangcah amin ku lalavu nu luma’ nu niyam.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是阿美族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Amis.

ab: U Yincumin amin haw ku lalavu nu luma’ nu misu?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Caay, u Pangcah ci ama aku, u Hulam ku ina nu maku.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是阿美族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Amis, and my mother is Han Chinese.

ab: U nima saw a wawa kisu?
U wawa ni Mayaw Lahuk kaku.
U wama isu haw kiraan? Pina tu ku mihcaan nira?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Enem a pulu’ tu ku mihcaan nira.
U wama isu haw kiraan? Pina tu ku mihcaan nira?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Caay, u kalas nu niyaru’ nu niyam cira, walu a pulu’ tu ku mihcaan nira.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: Pina tu ku mihcaan ni kaka nu misu?
Savaw tu walu tu ku mihcaan ni kaka nu maku.
Hacuwa saw ku pikikaka nu kaka isu itisuwan?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大幾歲嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: Lima a mihcaan ku laed nu niyam.
Hacuwa ku tarakaw nu misu?
Caay a patekenan ira ku sepat a pulu’ a kong-fen kaku.
Matenes tu kita caay kasasuaraw, mavatacay tu kisu?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: Hayi, cacay a patekenan ira ku tulu a pulu’ a kong-fen kaku.
Masusuay tu kisu haw?
Icuwa saw, patelacay ku nipimelaw nu misu.
Maku:pit tu kisu?
Icuwa saw, masusu tu kaku.
Masusu: tu kisu?
Hayi, tulu a pulu’ a kong-cin kaku anini.
